Row.Text: The effects of an Event have worn off:[NEWLINE]{1_Event}
The effects of an Event in {2_City} have worn off:[NEWLINE]{1_Event}
[COLOR_WARNING_TEXT]You cannot take this Event Choice. Either you do not meet the requirements, or its effects are still active.[ENDCOLOR]
You have no active Player Event Choices
You have no active City Event Choices
You have no recent City Events
Lists all Events that are instant effects (i.e. lacked player choice).
Lists all Events that required player input.
This hides the window, but does not dismiss the Event.
Unknown foreign operatives [COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]failed[ENDCOLOR] a Spy Mission in {2_City}: {1_EventChoice}
Our attempted Spy Mission in {2_City} failed. {1_EventChoice}.
Unknown foreign operatives [COLOR_NEGATIVE_TEXT]completed[ENDCOLOR] a Spy Mission in {1_City}: {2_MissionResult}
Our spies have reported the following to headquarters in [COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]{1_City}[ENDCOLOR]:[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{2_Event}
{2_Num} {1_Improvement}(s) pillaged near {3_City} due to Event Choice!
{2_Num} source(s) of {1_Resource} pillaged near {3_City} due to Event Choice!
[COLOR_NEGATIVE_TEXT]{1_Building}[ENDCOLOR] destroyed in {2_City} due to Event Choice!
An Event with multiple options has occurred, and awaits your decision.
An Event with multiple options has occurred, and awaits your decision.
A City Event with multiple options has occurred, and awaits your decision.
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Another Player's Events or Event Choices prohibit this choice
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] You must have a negative GPT
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] You lack the required Yields to make this choice
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Must be at war with a City-State
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires ownership of a Holy City.
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Must have met another Major Civilization
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Must have at least one {1_Desc} Unit
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Targeted Civilization must be Very Unhappy
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires an available slot for a Trade Unit
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Invalid due to an active Player Event Choice
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Invalid due to an active Player Event
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires a specific Player Event Choice to be active
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires a specific Player Event to be active
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Must have a nearby Natural Wonder
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Must be connected by a Trade Route
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Must have a City Connection to your Capital
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Must be at war with a Major Civilization
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires ownership of Holy City for {1_Desc}
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Must be the Holy City for {1_Desc}
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] City must not follow your majority Religion
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] City must follow your majority Religion
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] City must not follow your founded/controlled Religion
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] City must follow your founded/controlled Religion
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires this Policy: {1_Desc} (if name of branch, you need Finisher)
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires your dominant Religion to be a Pantheon
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires you to be in at least the {1_Desc}
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Disabled for specific scenario reasons (ask Mom)
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] City must be experiencing [COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]We Love the King Day[ENDCOLOR]
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Barbarians are not allowed to enter owned territory yet
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] City must be on a river
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Event choice can only be chosen once per game
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires City Event that is not currently active
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET] Requires City Event Choice that is not currently active
[COLOR_WARNING_TEXT]无法选择此事件选项。因不满足事件要求，或是此选项正在生效。[ENDCOLOR]
没有可用的文明事件选项
没有可用的城市事件选项
显示所有拥有即时效果的事件
显示所有需要玩家决策的事件
针对城市的[ICON_SPY][COLOR_NEGATIVE_TEXT]间谍行动[ENDCOLOR][NEWLINE][NEWLINE]敌方收益：
隐藏事件窗口，但不会跳过此事件。
{5_CivAdj}的间谍在{4_City}执行间谍任务[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]失败[ENDCOLOR]：'{3_Event}'.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{1_EventChoice} ({2_EventChoiceHelp})
未知的外国间谍在{4_City}执行间谍任务[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]失败[ENDCOLOR]：'{3_Event}'.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{1_EventChoice} ({2_EventChoiceHelp})
未知的外国间谍在{1_City}的阴谋被挫败了！
我们企图对{4_City}实施的间谍行动失败了。'{3_Event}': [NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{1_EventChoice} ({2_EventChoiceHelp})
我们的间谍在{1_City}的行动失败！
未知的外国间谍在{3_City}执行任务[COLOR_NEGATIVE_TEXT]成功[ENDCOLOR]：[NEWLINE]{1_EventChoice} ({2_EventChoiceHelp})
未知的外国间谍在{1_City}的任务成功了！
我们的间谍向总部报告了[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]{1_City}[ENDCOLOR]的如下情况：[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{2_Event}
{3_City}附近的{2_Num}处{1_Improvement}遭到劫掠（事件效果）！
{3_City}附近的{2_Num}处{1_Resource}遭到劫掠（事件效果）！
一个随机事件已经触发，正等待你的决策。
一个随机事件已经触发，正等待你的决策。
一个随机事件已经触发，正等待你的决策。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]另一个玩家的决策让此选项不可选。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]你缺乏该选项所需的相关资源。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要{1_Desc}改良设施在城市范围内。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]由于另一个玩家事件选项而无效。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要已经选择特定玩家事件选项。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要已经选择特定玩家事件选项。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]必须已经连结一条贸易路线。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]必须与另一个文明处于战争。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市没有信仰你的主流宗教。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市必须信仰你的主流宗教。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市没有信仰你所创建或主要控制的宗教。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市必须信仰你所创建或主要控制的宗教。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]政策需求：{1_Desc}（若需求为政策树名称，则需要完成一整条政策树）
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要大多数城市都信仰神系
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市必须处于[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]我们爱国王日[ENDCOLOR]期间
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]事件选项只能被选择一次（整场游戏）
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要当前未激活的城市事件
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要当前未激活的城市事件选项
[COLOR_WARNING_TEXT]無法選擇此事件選項。因不滿足事件要求，或是此選項正在生效。[ENDCOLOR]
沒有可用的文明事件選項
沒有可用的城市事件選項
顯示所有擁有即時效果的事件
顯示所有需要玩家決策的事件
針對城市的[ICON_SPY][COLOR_NEGATIVE_TEXT]間諜行動[ENDCOLOR][NEWLINE][NEWLINE]敵方收益：
隱藏事件窗口，但不會跳過此事件。
{5_CivAdj}的間諜在{4_City}執行間諜任務[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]失敗[ENDCOLOR]：'{3_Event}'.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{1_EventChoice} ({2_EventChoiceHelp})
未知的外國間諜在{4_City}執行間諜任務[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]失敗[ENDCOLOR]：'{3_Event}'.[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{1_EventChoice} ({2_EventChoiceHelp})
未知的外國間諜在{1_City}的陰謀被挫敗了！
我們企圖對{4_City}實施的間諜行動失敗了。'{3_Event}': [NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{1_EventChoice} ({2_EventChoiceHelp})
我們的間諜在{1_City}的行動失敗！
未知的外國間諜在{3_City}執行任務[COLOR_NEGATIVE_TEXT]成功[ENDCOLOR]：[NEWLINE]{1_EventChoice} ({2_EventChoiceHelp})
未知的外國間諜在{1_City}的任務成功了！
我們的間諜向總部報告了[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]{1_City}[ENDCOLOR]的如下情況：[NEWLINE][NEWLINE]{2_Event}
{3_City}附近的{2_Num}處{1_Improvement}遭到劫掠（事件效果）！
{3_City}附近的{2_Num}處{1_Resource}遭到劫掠（事件效果）！
一個隨機事件已經觸發，正等待你的決策。
一個隨機事件已經觸發，正等待你的決策。
一個隨機事件已經觸發，正等待你的決策。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]另一個玩家的決策讓此選項不可選。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]你缺乏該選項所需的相關資源。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要{1_Desc}改良設施在城市範圍內。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]由於另一個玩家事件選項而無效。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要已經選擇特定玩家事件選項。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要已經選擇特定玩家事件選項。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]必須已經連結一條貿易路線。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]必須與另一個文明處於戰爭。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市沒有信仰你的主流宗教。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市必須信仰你的主流宗教。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市沒有信仰你所創建或主要控製的宗教。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市必須信仰你所創建或主要控製的宗教。
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]政策需求：{1_Desc}（若需求為政策樹名稱，則需要完成一整條政策樹）
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要大多數城市都信仰神系
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]城市必須處於[COLOR_POSITIVE_TEXT]我們愛國王日[ENDCOLOR]期間
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]事件選項只能被選擇一次（整場遊戲）
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要當前未激活的城市事件
[NEWLINE] [ICON_BULLET]需要當前未激活的城市事件選項
